# Bubbleforge Assistant Rules (v2)

## UI Scrollbar Rule (Global)

- Show scrollbars only in menu surfaces (hub panel, sheets, pickers, rails).
- Do not show scrollbars on regular page/screen content.
- Menu scrollbars must be small and thin.
- Scrollbar track must stay transparent (never opaque/white blocking bars).
- Menu scrollbar thumb should appear only while scrolling and auto-hide after 2 seconds of inactivity.
